dct_title_s: Ukrainae pars quae Podolia palatinatus vulgo dicitur
dct_description_sm: per Guil. le Vasseur de Beauplan, S.R.Mtis. Poloniae Architectum militarem etc..
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Bar scale on mapp in upper right: "Milliaria Polonica", "M. Ocrenica", "M. Germanica"
Has decorative cartouche featuring cherubs and a man wielding a spear.
dct_publisher_sm: apud J. Cóvens et C. Mortier
